records.ety: [The same word as to, prep. See To.]

defs: Over; more than enough; -- noting excess; as, a thing is too long, too short, or too wide; too high; too many; too much.
quotes: His will, too strong to bend, too proud to learn.
An honest courtier, yet a patriot too.
Let those eyes that view The daring crime, behold the vengeance too.
O that this too too solid flesh would melt.
Such is not Charles his too too active age.
